variants.title: ST1260
variants.description: Fleetguard® ST1260 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 60µ, Outer Diameter: 202.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 157.0 mm, Length: 545.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 60µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: ST1260
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P566978 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Fleetguard ST1260
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P566978 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.

Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R742T60 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. variants.title: ST1260
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0240 R 005 ON Optimicron® Return Filter | Replaces the Fleetguard ST1260
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0240 R 005 ON Optimicron® Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.

variants.title: ST1260
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHR50653 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Fleetguard ST1260
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHR50653 UltraGen III Return Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
